rulings.Case Title: UMPQUA BANK A STATE CHARTERED BANK VS. RENKA PROP. LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Setting Aside Discovery Terminating Sanction Striking Answer Entering Default And Default Judgment For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 11, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANT RENKA PROP LLC's Motion For Order Setting Aside Discovery Terminating Sanction, Striking Answer, Entering Default, And Default Judgment For Attorney's Fees is DENIED. Moving party fails to provide any legal or evidentiary basis to set aside Court's 2019 orders at this time. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 11, 2021 line 5. DEFENDANT TRIVON SIMMONS-KRAFFT'S Motion And Special Motion To Strike The First Amended Complaint Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 425.16 is continued to March 10, 2021 to be heard with other pending motions. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES WANNINGER ET AL VS. 195-205 TAMAL VISTA BLVD LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 11, 2021 line 5. DEFENDANT 195-205 TAMAL VISTA BLVD LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is continued to March 10, 2021. By no later than February 26, 2021 Plaintiff to submit a supplemental brief not to exceed 2 pages (1) expressly stating if any claims are brought by Lillian (opposition suggests both that they are and they are not, compare "[Lillian] not be deprived her day in Court on her Malicious Prosecution claim" and "there is only one plaintiff, [James], for himself and his minor child.") and (2) provide citations to cases where Plaintiffs, situated as Lillian, were found to have standing to proceed with malicious prosecution claims, e.g. not parties to underlying actions, not tenants, etc. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DOMINICK DOONG VS. CHEUNG LOI LI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses, And For Sanctions - Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 11, 2021 line 7. PLAINTIFF DOMINICK DOONG'S Motion For Order Compelling Responses, And For Sanctions is GRANTED. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Untimely objections are overruled. Sanctions granted in the amount of $710 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/CFH)
